subject: [PATCH v4 11/11] selftests/mm: add PMD swap entry tests

2026-07-13.patch_summary: This patch adds a set of tests to exercise PMD swap entry paths in the Linux kernel. The tests cover various scenarios, including swapping out and in a THP (Transparent Huge Page), forking processes with read-only and write access, and verifying correct behavior when performing operations such as munmap, mprotect, UFFDIO_MOVE, and MADV_FREE on a swapped PMD. The tests also account for the presence of zswap, which can split PMD swap entries into PTE-level entries. The patch aims to ensure that the kernel correctly handles PMD-level swap entries and restores them when necessary.
